Was a profound state that was the goal of yoga a
and meditation. The
word shunya means zero, and the word shunyata
(zeroness)
)wasused
extensively in these works to describe the state that one is trying
to
reach during 1
 meditation -that of emptying c
one's mind of all vrttis
(fluctuations of the mind) to achieve the state of perfect stillness and
tranquility. Patanjali in the Yoga Sutras around the 3rd century BCE also
